---
title: "08_bronvermelding"
output: html_document
---

```{r, eval = false}
library(rbbt)
```

# 5 bronnen + meer info over leptospira

https://www.rivm.nl/leptospirose 
Faine 1999, Levett, 2001; Cameron, 2014; Picardeau, 2017, Vincent et al., 2019; Hornsby; Alt; Nally, 2020

Zhu et al., 2015; Adler et al., 2015; Vincent et al., 2019
